category_sources: source_facts.description says finite state transducers for compact large sets and maps; official GitHub README describes ordered sets and maps using finite state machines/transducers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fst; official GitHub repository and docs.rs crate use fst.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to https://docs.rs/fst as documentation and includes examples and installation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/BurntSushi/fst, so repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says large sets and maps with finite state transducers; official GitHub README describes finite state machines, maps, sets, and docs.rs documentation.
